data.name: PropertyReadOnly
data.value: Property '{propertyName}' is read-only.

data.name: PropertyNotSet
data.value: Property '{propertyName}' is not set.

data.name: OperationValidOnlyInPendingState
data.value: This operation is only valid when the object is in the Pending state.

data.name: SfcObjectInitFailed
data.value: The initialize operation on object {objName} failed.

data.name: SfcInvalidConnectionContextModeChange
data.value: The connection context mode cannot be changed from {fromMode} to {toMode}.

data.name: InvalidKey
data.value: The {keyName} key is not a valid key. This can be because member variables are not yet set.

data.name: InvalidKeyChain
data.value: The parent or key of the KeyChain is not the same as the previously set parent or key.

data.name: InvalidRename
data.value: The rename failed.

data.name: InvalidMove
data.value: The move failed.

data.name: KeyExists
data.value: The {key} key already exists in the collection.

data.name: KeyNotFound
data.value: The {key} key is not found in the collection.

data.name: KeyAlreadySet
data.value: The key to this object is already set. Setting the keychain is not allowed.

data.name: KeyChainAlreadySet
data.value: The key chain to this object already exists and the parents do not match.

data.name: SfcInvalidArgument
data.value: The '{argumentName}' argument is either null or invalid.

data.name: SfcInvalidReaderStream
data.value: The '{argumentName}' input stream is closed, at end-of-file or in an error state.

data.name: SfcInvalidWriterStream
data.value: The '{argumentName}' output stream is closed or in an error state.

data.name: SfcInvalidSerialization
data.value: Serialization output is invalid.

data.name: SfcInvalidDeserialization
data.value: Deserialization input in corrupt.

data.name: SfcInvalidDeserializationMissingParent
data.value: Deserialization input is invalid. The parent entry of '{instanceUri}' is missing. The parent entry '{parentUri}' is expected to occurs before its children.

data.name: SfcInvalidSerializationInstance
data.value: Serialization operation on {instanceName} has failed.

data.name: SfcInvalidDeserializationInstance
data.value: Deserialization operation on {instanceName} has failed.

data.name: SfcNullArgumentToSerialize
data.value: The instance passed in to serialize is a null instance.

data.name: SfcNullArgumentToResolve
data.value: The instance passed in to resolve is a null instance.

data.name: SfcNullArgumentToResolveCollection
data.value: The instance passed in to resolve collection is a null instance.

data.name: SfcNullArgumentToSfcReferenceAttribute
data.value: The resolver type passed in to the '{attribute}' attribute is null.

data.name: SfcNullInvalidSfcReferenceResolver
data.value: The resolver type '{resolverType}' does not implement interface '{resolverInterface}' needed to perform resolving.

data.name: SfcNullArgumentToViewAttribute
data.value: The view name passed in to the relation view attribute is null.

data.name: SfcNullArgumentToProxyInstance
data.value: The instance passed in to the proxy as the referenced instance is null.

data.name: SfcNullWriterToSerialize
data.value: The writer passed in to serialize is a null instance.

data.name: SfcNullReaderToSerialize
data.value: The reader passed in to serialize is a null instance.

data.name: SfcNonSerializableType
data.value: Type {typeName} is not supported for serialization.

data.name: SfcInvalidWriteWithoutDiscovery
data.value: Write method invoked without setting instances to serialize.

data.name: SfcNonSerializableProperty
data.value: Serializer cannot handle the property {property}. The property is not in the property bag of the instance type.

data.name: UnregisteredXmlSfcDomain
data.value: The Xml contains an unregistered Sfc Domain '{sfcDomainName}'

data.name: UnregisteredSfcXmlType
data.value: The Xml contains an unregistered Sfc Domain '{sfcDomain}' with Type '{sfcType}'

data.name: CannotDeserializeNonSerializableProperty
data.value: The Xml contains property '{propertyName}' within Sfc Type '{sfcTypeName}' that is attributed as non-serializable.

data.name: SfcUnsupportedVersion
data.value: The serialized content's version is higher than the domain's current version. Deserialization cannot proceed.

data.name: SfcUnsupportedDomainUpgrade
data.value: The domain does not support Serialization upgrade. Deserialization cannot proceed with older version content.

data.name: EmptySfcXml
data.value: The Xml passed in is either empty or does not contain any Xml elements that could be deserialized.

data.name: InvalidSfcXmlParentType
data.value: The Xml expects a parent object in Sfc Domain '{sfcExpectedParentDomain}' with Type '{sfcExpectedParentType}', but the parent object Type is '{sfcGivenParentType}'.

data.name: InvalidSMOQuery
data.value: '{query}' is an invalid query expression for a SMO ObjectQuery. The query is expected to start with 'Server'.

data.name: ParentHasNoConnecton
data.value: Cannot set a parent that is a root but does not have a connection.

data.name: SfcQueryConnectionUnavailable
data.value: A query connection is unavailable or not supported for the requested query execution environment. This is usually due to a request for Multiple Active Queries on a single user mode server or other condition preventing a valid connection.

data.name: BadCreateIdentityKey
data.value: CreateIdentityKey returned null. The domain implementation is incorrect.

data.name: InvalidState
data.value: Unable to perform this operation on an object in state '{current_state}'. The object must be in state '{required_state}'.

data.name: CRUDOperationFailed
data.value: Operation '{opname}' on object '{objname}' failed during execution.

data.name: ObjectNotScriptabe
data.value: Domain error: object '{objname}' is in the dependency graph but CRUD operation cannot be scripted. Consider changing IsCrudActionHandledByParent in TypeMetadata for class '{className}'.

data.name: UnsupportedAction
data.value: The action '{action}' is unsupported for type '{className}'.

data.name: MissingParent
data.value: Must set the Parent to perform this operation.

data.name: opCreate
data.value: Create

data.name: opRename
data.value: Rename

data.name: opMove
data.value: Move

data.name: opAlter
data.value: Alter

data.name: opDrop
data.value: Drop

data.name: CannotMoveNoDestination
data.value: Cannot move object '{obj}', no destination parent object given.

data.name: CannotMoveDestinationIsDescendant
data.value: Cannot move object '{obj}', the destination parent object '{destObj}' may not be our descendant.

data.name: CannotMoveDestinationHasDuplicate
data.value: Cannot move object '{obj}', the destination parent object '{destObj}' has a duplicate child.

data.name: CannotRenameNoProperties
data.value: Cannot rename object '{obj}', key has no properties.

data.name: CannotRenameMissingProperty
data.value: Cannot rename object '{obj}', must have property '{missingProperty}'.

data.name: CannotRenameNoKey
data.value: Cannot rename object '{obj}', no key given.

data.name: CannotRenameDestinationHasDuplicate
data.value: Cannot rename object '{obj}', the key '{key}' already exists.

data.name: PermissionDenied
data.value: Don't have rights to execute requested operation.

data.name: IncompatibleWithSfcListAdapterCollection
data.value: Provided Collection is not compatible with SfcListAdapter. It should implement IList, IListSource or IEnumerable<{type}>.

data.name: BadQueryForConnection
data.value: '{query}': invalid query expression root when connected to '{rootName}'

data.name: CannotCreateDestinationHasDuplicate
data.value: Object '{obj}' already exists

data.name: MissingSqlCeTools
data.value: Unable to Load Microsoft SQL Server Compact. Install Microsoft SQL Server Compact MSIs from the folder - Servers\Setup on the SQL Server installation media. For more details, please refer to KB Article 952218.

data.name: AttributeConflict
data.value: The '{firstAttribute}' and '{secondAttribute}' attributes on '{typeName}.{propertyName}' are conflicting.

data.name: DomainNotFound
data.value: Domain '{name}' was not found on the list of registered domain.

data.name: PropertyUsageError
data.value: Property {name} cannot be used for {usage}

data.name: UsageRequest
data.value: request

data.name: UsageFilter
data.value: filter

data.name: UsageOrderBy
data.value: order by

data.name: PropertyCannotHaveAlias
data.value: Property {name} cannot have an alias. It is not requested.

data.name: InvalidPrefixAlias
data.value: Cannot find alias for property {name}. The Prefix property is null.

data.name: AliasNotSpecified
data.value: Cannot find alias for property {name}. Alias was not specified.

data.name: InvalidAlias
data.value: Invalid alias kind.

data.name: ResultNotSupported
data.value: result type not supported

data.name: UnknownProperty
data.value: unknown property {property}

data.name: UnknownType
data.value: unknown type {type}

data.name: XPathUnclosedString
data.value: unclosed string

data.name: XPathSyntaxError
data.value: syntax error

data.name: FailedToLoadAssembly
data.value: failed to load assembly {assembly}.

data.name: CouldNotInstantiateObj
data.value: could not instantiate object {objType}.

data.name: UnknowNodeType
data.value: unknown node type

data.name: UnknownOperator
data.value: unknown operator

data.name: UnknownFunction
data.value: unknown function

data.name: VariablesNotSupported
data.value: variables not supported

data.name: UnknownElemType
data.value: unknown element type

data.name: ChildrenNotSupported
data.value: child expressions are not supported.

data.name: UnsupportedExpresion
data.value: unsupported expression

data.name: NotDerivedFrom
data.value: {objType} is not derived from {objName}.

data.name: ISupportInitDataNotImplement
data.value: {objType} doesn't implement ISupportInitData, but it has a configuration file.

data.name: UrnCouldNotBeResolvedAtLevel
data.value: urn could not be resolved at level {level}.

data.name: InvalidNode
data.value: invalid node.

data.name: NoPropertiesRequested
data.value: The query must have at least one property to return.

data.name: FailedRequest
data.value: Failed to retrieve data for this request.

data.name: IncorrectVersionTag
data.value:
Incorrect version tag. You must specify either a min_major, cloud_min_major or datawarehouse_enabled attribute.
{elementContent}

data.name: InvalidAttributeValue
data.value: Value '{value}' on attribute '{attributeName}' was unable to be parsed correctly.

data.name: NullVersionOnLoadingCfgFile
data.value: Version was not specified on loading configuration file.

data.name: EnumObjectTagNotFound
data.value: Enumeration object tag was not found.

data.name: InvalidConnectionType
data.value: Connection type is not valid.

data.name: OnlyPathOrFullName
data.value: Only Path or only FullName must be specified.

data.name: DatabaseNameMustBeSpecified
data.value: Database name must be specified.

data.name: FailedToLoadResFile
data.value: File {fileName} was not found. The file might be missing in sources or misspelled in config.xml (note: file name in config.xml is case sensitive)

data.name: UnsupportedTypeDepDiscovery
data.value: {objType} is not supported in dependency discovery. Only objects of the following types are supported: {suppList}.

data.name: QueryNotSupportedPostProcess
data.value: Cannot provide DataReader because of the properties: {propList}

data.name: FailedToCreateUrn
data.value: Failed to create URN for object code: '{objCode}'

data.name: PropMustBeSpecified
data.value: {prop} must be specified on {obj}.

data.name: InvalidUrnForDepends
data.value: Urn is not valid for dependency discovery: {urn}

data.name: TooManyDbLevels
data.value: too many database levels.

data.name: InvalidConfigurationFile
data.value: Configuration file is not valid.

data.name: MissingSection
data.value: invalid configuration file: missing section {section}.

data.name: NotDbObject
data.value: object is not under database.

data.name: NotSingleDb
data.value: objects are not in a single database.

data.name: NoClassNamePostProcess
data.value: <post_process> tag missing class_name.

data.name: InvalidVersion
data.value: Operation not supported on version {version}.

data.name: InvalidSqlServer
data.value: Operation not supported on {productName}.

data.name: DatabaseNameMustBeSpecifiedinTheUrn
data.value: The database name must be specified in the urn: {urn}

data.name: CouldNotGetInfoFromDependencyRow
data.value: Failed to retrieve dependency information ({rowInformation}).

data.name: SqlServer90Name
data.value: SQL Server 2005

data.name: SqlServer80Name
data.value: SQL Server 2000

data.name: InvalidTypeForProperty
data.value: The property '{propertyName}' is not valid from the type '{typeName}' context

data.name: InvalidUrn
data.value: Invalid URN.

data.name: UnknownDomain
data.value: URN starts with an unknown root element '{root}'.

data.name: NoProvider
data.value: No provider is available for URN '{urn}'.

data.name: LevelNotFound
data.value: Unknown level '{level}' in URN '{urn}'.

data.name: InvalidKeyValue
data.value: Empty key '{key}' in URN '{urn}'.

data.name: MissingKeys
data.value: URN '{urn}' has one or more missing keys at level '{level}'.

data.name: ServerNameMissing
data.value: Server name is missing from URN '{urn}'.

data.name: DomainRootUnknown
data.value: Domain root for type '{fullTypeName}' is unknown. Cannot retrieve logical version.

data.name: PropertyNotsupported
data.value: Property not supported for current server version.

data.name: ObjectNotSupportedOnSqlDw
data.value: This object is not supported on Azure Synapse Analytics databases.
